title: Samantha's Flight to Serbia
author: Dady Fredy
subtitle: A Bedtime Story by Dady Fredy
dedication: For Samantha — born in Angeles City, roots in Belgrade.

pages.title: Samantha's Flight to Serbia
pages.subtitle: A Bedtime Story by Dady Fredy
pages.dedication: For Samantha — born in Angeles City, roots in Belgrade.

lines: Pack your bags, Samantha — we're leaving tonight!
On a paper airplane bathed in moonlight.
From Angeles City where you were born,
To Belgrade, Serbia — by the break of morn.
